title: E-15A blaster rifle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''E-15A blaster rifle''' was produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] and used by some of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] ground forces.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
